text: A cross country skier is going through Vancouver.
There is a red double decker bus at the side of the street.
People enjoying the beach during a sunny day.
Many signs are posted on the chain link fence behind a fire hydrant.
A ambulance and a fire truck on a highway.
A large and a small giraffe in a green enclosure.
The mouse is latched onto the white object.
A very clean toilet with the lid up next to toilet paper.
There are two zebras one zebra is eating grass.
A couple of small birds sitting on a fence.
